mapper.sql: id, author_id, category_id, post_type, product_id, title, content, is_deleted, audit_status, display_status, like_count, comment_count, share_count, collect_count, view_count, last_commented_at, published_at, reject_reason, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO forum_post (author_id, category_id, post_type, product_id, title, content, is_deleted, audit_status, display_status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{authorId}, #{categoryId}, #{postType}, #{productId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{isDeleted}, #{auditStatus}, #{displayStatus}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE forum_post SET author_id = #{authorId}, category_id = #{categoryId}, post_type = #{postType}, product_id = #{productId}, title = #{title}, content = #{content}, is_deleted = #{isDeleted}, audit_status = #{auditStatus}, display_status = #{displayStatus}, like_count = #{likeCount}, comment_count = #{commentCount}, share_count = #{shareCount}, collect_count = #{collectCount}, view_count = #{viewCount}, last_commented_at = #{lastCommentedAt}, published_at = #{publishedAt}, reject_reason = #{rejectReason}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM forum_post WHERE is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT FROM forum_post WHERE author_id = #{authorId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT FROM forum_post WHERE audit_status = #{auditStatus} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE forum_post SET like_count = #{likeCount}, comment_count = #{commentCount}, share_count = #{shareCount}, collect_count = #{collectCount}, view_count = #{viewCount}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
